reviews.author: Kuldeep
reviews.review_body: Sapphire International School, Noida is one of the renowned schools in Delhi-NCR.

reviews.author: nikita malhotra
reviews.review_body: Excellent school. A great team working together to provide excellence for students. Our experience at Sapphire has been exceptional. The teachers are truly invested in children’s education and growth as learner’s. Adjustments are made as needed to meet the needs of the student. Hygiene, academic, extra curricular activities, transparency, regular feedback, approachability -all upto the mark.

reviews.author: Malika Malik
reviews.review_body:
It is a great school with good infrastructure, experienced and quality teachers, ample teaching resources and extra curricular activities. With all things combined, the school fosters holistic development of its students and pave the path for their achievements.
I highly recommend this school for your child's better future.

reviews.author: Archana kapoor
reviews.review_body:
Great school!!! My kid is .very happy to be at this school.
Teachers always motivate my child and bring new opportunities feel my child is in safe hands.
Thank you so much  sapphire international school.

reviews.author: Sophia Sharda
reviews.review_body: Sapphire International School is an exceptional educational institution that prioritizes excellence in both academics and character development. The commitment of the faculty, the comprehensive curriculum, and the outstanding facilities all contribute to an enriching and enjoyable learning experience. I highly recommend Sapphire International School to any parent seeking a nurturing and holistic educational environment for their child.

reviews.author: Sarthak Sharma
reviews.review_body: I recently enrolled my child at this school and I couldn't be happier with my decision. The teachers are dedicated and knowledgeable, and they create a warm and welcoming environment for the students. My child is thriving academically and socially and has made many new friends. The curriculum is well-rounded and challenging, but the teachers are always available to provide extra help when needed. The facilities are top-notch and the school is always clean and well-maintained. I highly recommend this school to anyone looking for a quality education for their child.
